demographics.living_situation: lives alone at home; adult child came to check on her and made the call

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I came to check on her, and she is freezing cold, completely unresponsive, and barely breathing.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Adult child calling for help: found their elderly mother at home unrousable, ice-cold to the touch and taking only very slow, shallow breaths — they cannot wake her at all.

symptom_narrative.onset: over the past week she got more and more sluggish, weak and confused after what seemed like a mild cold; in the last 12 hours she became very confused and then couldn't be woken at all
symptom_narrative.duration: about a week of decline, then a rapid slide into unresponsiveness over the last 12 hours
symptom_narrative.character: she has been getting slower, weaker and more muddled, and now she is freezing cold, limp, unresponsive and barely breathing
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the child says she looks like she is dying and is terrified
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: her whole body — she is cold all over and completely floppy
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: steadily worsening over the week, then sharply and dramatically worse in the last 12 hours
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: it just kept getting worse on its own; she stopped taking her thyroid tablets about five days ago because she was too confused to manage them
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: she had a mild cold recently, her skin has been coarse and very dry and her hair thin for a long time, and she was found lying on the floor in a cold house with no blankets over her
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: nothing like this has ever happened before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: completely unresponsive and dependent; she is not moving, not speaking and not protecting her own breathing

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: underactive thyroid (the family were told it was Hashimoto's), for which she takes a daily thyroid tablet
past_medical_history.how_managed: daily thyroxine tablet, though she has missed several doses over the past week

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: longstanding coarse, dry skin and thinning hair

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: elderly woman living alone; the house was found cold and she was on the floor without blankets; the adult child is present, very frightened and does not feel able to manage her at home

objective_data_offered.value: she is freezing cold to touch all over, completely unresponsive and will not wake at all when spoken to or shaken
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: frightened adult child's description over the phone; no measured vital signs available

objective_data_offered.value: she is barely breathing — only very slow, shallow breaths, and her lips and skin look a bit blue/dusky
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: observed by an anxious carer, not measured; a respiratory rate or oxygen level cannot be confirmed remotely

objective_data_offered.value: her face and eyelids look puffy and swollen, and her skin looks coarse, dry and pale; she is completely limp and not moving on camera
the house is cold and she was found lying on the floor with no blankets over her
